news.headline: Pure Storage's stock surged by 20% after exceeding earnings expectations and highlighting a cloud 'design win.'
news.summary: In their recent financial report, Pure Storage exceeded expectations with both earnings and sales figures. The company experienced a notable 20% surge in their stock value following this announcement. Particularly highlighted was their success in securing a significant cloud 'design win.' This achievement further emphasized Pure Storage's competitiveness in the market.

news.headline: Hemlock Steakhouse bringing inventive cuisine to Boise, opening in Spring 2025. Embracing new traditions.
news.summary: Scheduled to open in Spring 2025, Hemlock will bring innovative cuisine and contemporary vibes to Boise, Idaho. This new steakhouse promises to offer a fresh take on traditional steakhouse concepts. Positioned as a boutique establishment, Hemlock aims to revitalize Boise's culinary landscape.

news.headline: 104 people affected by E Coli from onions on McDonald’s Quarter Pounders; federal health agencies end investigation.
news.summary: The federal health agencies have concluded their inquiries into a bacterial outbreak that affected a total of 104 individuals. The source of the outbreak was linked to onions that were served on the fast-food chain's popular Quarter Pounders.

news.headline: South Korea lifts martial law after 6-hour standoff, boosting crypto markets. President Yoon Suk Yeol steps back, calming National Assembly tensions.
news.summary: The President of South Korea, Yoon Suk Yeol, has rescinded his decision to impose martial law following a six-hour period of intense tension at the country's National Assembly.

Dominion Lending Centres Inc. (TSX: DLCG) receives shareholder approval for acquisition of preferred shares and related transactions in special meeting.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 3, 2024, Dominion Lending Centres Inc. (TSX: DLCG) revealed outcomes from a special gathering for Class A common shares holders. The meeting saw participation from Shareholders and included discussions on DLCG's performance.

news.headline: Dell Technologies board declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.445/share, payable on Jan. 31 to shareholders of record by Jan. 22.
news.summary: In Round Rock, Texas, on December 3, 2024, Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.445 per common share. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on January 31 to shareholders whose names are recorded as of January 22. Dell has also raised its yearly cash distribution...

CNEY receives NASDAQ extension for minimum bid price requirement, announced on November 26, 2024.
news.summary: In LISHUI, China, on December 3, 2024, CN Energy Group. Inc. (NASDAQ: CNEY) disclosed that it had been notified on November 26, 2024, by the Listing Qualifications Staff of The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq") regarding certain qualifications pertaining to its listing.

news.headline: Skyharbour increases private placement to raise up to C$9.5 million in gross proceeds.
news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.3%, with a total of 10.7 million people currently out of work. Furthermore, the report also stated that the inflation rate has reached 3.5%, marking a significant increase compared to the previous quarter. The government has announced plans to implement new policies and initiatives to address these economic challenges and stimulate job growth in the coming months. Additionally, economists are predicting a gradual recovery of the economy by the end of the year, with a projected GDP growth rate of 5.2%. Despite the current setbacks, there is cautious optimism about the future economic outlook.

news.headline: POET Technologies completes US$25M offering, issuing 5.56M shares and 2.78M warrants. Share price:US$4.50, Warrant:US$6.00.
news.summary: POET Technologies Inc. has successfully completed a registered direct offering with a single institutional investor, issuing 5,555,556 common shares and 2,777,778 warrants. The gross proceeds from the offering totaled US$25,000,002. The price for one common share and accompanying warrant was US$4.50, with the warrant exercisable at US$6.00 per share within a five-year period. The offering is aimed at enhancing the corporation's presence in the data center, telecommunication, and artificial intelligence markets.

news.headline: Kiwibank prices NZ$500m five-year bonds at 4.746%
Illuvium game to launch G-Shock NFTs in collaboration, part of Beyond collectors game. #Ethereum #crypto #collab
news.summary: In a recent announcement, the creators of Illuvium unveiled their plans to introduce G-Shock NFTs in the upcoming Beyond collectors game. This move marks an exciting development for fans of the game, as the inclusion of G-Shock NFTs will offer a unique collectible experience. With this integration, players will have the opportunity to own and trade these exclusive digital assets within the game ecosystem. Keep an eye out for the launch of G-Shock NFTs in Illuvium's Beyond collectors game to be part of this innovative gaming experience.

news.headline: Pure Storage and Kioxia join forces to enhance data center scalability, efficiency, and performance.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on December 3, 2024, Pure Storage® (NYSE: PSTG) revealed a partnership with Kioxia Corporation to work on advancing data storage technology. Pure Storage® is recognized for its innovative IT solutions, while Kioxia is a prominent figure in memory solutions globally.

news.headline: TCL joins HEVC Advance Patent Pool with PurpleVine's help on Nov 26, 2024, in Shenzhen, China. Important date: Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on December 3, 2024, it was reported that Access Advance LLC ("AA") and TCL Electronics Holdings Limited ("TCL" or "Client") revealed TCL's entrance as a licensee into the HEVC Advance Patent Pool on November 26, 2024. This move was facilitated by PurpleVine IP Group ("PurpleVine"). This announcement marks TCL's official affiliation with the HEVC Advance Patent Pool, signifying a significant step in their business strategy.

news.headline: Gatos Silver sets Special Meeting date for stockholders and files proxy statement ahead of merger with First Majestic.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on December 3, 2024, Gatos Silver, Inc. (NYSE/TSX: GATO) disclosed details about the Special Meeting for stockholders and submitted its definitive proxy statement related to the Agreement and Plan of Merger with First Majestic Silver Corp. (NYSE/TSX: AG) (FSE: FMV). Per the agreement, First Majestic will purchase all outstanding shares of Gatos Silver.

news.headline: E. Coli outbreak from McDonald’s Quarter Pounders sickened 104; federal health agencies declare investigation closed.
news.summary: After an investigation, federal health agencies have concluded that a bacterial outbreak that affected 104 individuals was connected to onions used in a popular fast-food chain's Quarter Pounders. The investigation has since been closed.

news.headline: Elon Musk's success not tied to Trump, according to reports. #business #news
Microsoft declares $0.83 quarterly dividend, payable on March 13, 2025, to shareholders on record on Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, Microsoft Corp. disclosed today that its board of directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.83 per share. This dividend will be distributed on March 13, 2025, to shareholders holding positions as of Feb. 20, 2025. The ex-dividend date is set as Feb. 20, 2025, as per the announcement made by the company.

news.headline: Sprott Focus Trust, Inc. (Nasdaq-FUND) declares $0.2161 per share distribution for Q4; payable on Dec. 30, 2024 to stockholders of record on Dec. 13, 2024. Price for shares reinvestment set on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Sprott Focus Trust, Inc. announced a quarterly distribution of $0.2161 per share on its Common Stock (Nasdaq-FUND). This distribution can be received in additional shares of Common Stock or cash based on stockholder preference. The payment date for this distribution is scheduled for December 30, 2024, for stockholders of record as of December 13, 2024 (ex-dividend on December 13, 2024). The pricing of shares issued for reinvestment will be established on December 20, 2024.

Cylindrical Lithium-Ion Battery Market to grow by USD 11.61B (2024-2028), driven by EV shift, AI impacts.
news.summary: As per a recent report, the market landscape is undergoing a transformation due to the influence of artificial intelligence (AI). The global cylindrical lithium-ion battery market is projected to expand significantly by approximately USD 11.61 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a compounded annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.59%. This growth signifies the increasing adoption of AI within various industries and its impact on reshaping market dynamics.

news.headline: Eagle Electronics secures $14 million for new manufacturing facility in Ohio, gaining strong customer support.
news.summary: In Solon, Ohio on December 3, 2024, Eagle Electronics, a prominent company in high-tech electronics and cellular module manufacturing, has successfully secured a funding of $14 million. This investment was primarily backed by the O.H.I.O. Fund, with additional participation from Asymmetric Capital Partners. The capital will be utilized to launch state-of-the-art technologies and equipment...

news.headline: Currency traders in China closely monitor PBOC's fixings to assess support levels of yuan. #forex #marketupdate
Grayscale seeks to turn Solana Trust into ETF on NYSE Arca as spot ETFs rise in popularity amidst changing U.S. regulatory climate.
news.summary: In the United States, there has been an increasing interest in crypto-based spot exchange-traded funds (ETFs) over the past few months. This surge in popularity comes as regulators in the country are showing a more favorable stance towards digital assets. The number of crypto-based spot ETFs has risen substantially in response to this shift, with an increase in the number of investors looking to capitalize on this growing trend.

news.headline: McDonald's E. Coli outbreak affecting 104 people connected to onions in Quarter Pounders declared resolved by authorities.
news.summary: A bacterial outbreak that affected 104 individuals has been resolved following investigations conducted by federal health agencies. The source of the outbreak was traced back to onions used in the fast-food chain's popular Quarter Pounders.

news.headline: Asian markets are on edge following turmoil in South Korea; uncertainty looms.
IVD Contract Manufacturing Market projected to increase by $10.71B (2024-2028) due to demand for comprehensive solutions, AI influence.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was discussed how artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping the market scenario. According to Technavio, the global market size for in-vitro diagnostics (IVD) contract manufacturing is projected to increase significantly by approximately USD 10.71 billion between 2024 and 2028. The market is anticipated to witness a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.22% during this period, reflecting the substantial impact of AI on the industry landscape.

news.headline: Algoma Steel Group to join B. Riley Securities Energy Convergence Conference on Dec 4, 2024, in NY. Presentation to be posted on ir.algoma.com.
news.summary: Algoma Steel Group Inc., a prominent Canadian producer of hot and cold rolled steel sheet and plate products, will be taking part in the B. Riley Securities Energy Convergence Conference on December 4, 2024, at the Hotel Eventi in New York. The company's presentation for the event will be available on its website at ir.algoma.com. The stock of Algoma Steel is listed on both the NASDAQ (ASTL) and TSX (ASTL) exchanges.

news.headline: Eagle Bancorp, Inc. offers exchange for unregistered 10.00% Senior Notes due 2029 for registered Exchange Notes.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland on December 3, 2024, Eagle Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGBN) initiated a move to exchange its unregistered 10.00% Senior Notes due 2029 (referred to as the "Original Notes") for a corresponding principal sum of notes from the same category that have been registered under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (known as the "Exchange Notes"). This offer marks the commencement of the Exchange Offer by Eagle.

news.headline: Global post harvest treatment market to grow by USD 1.31 billion (2024-2028) at 8.07% CAGR, fueled by AI impact on fresh produce demand - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent study on the influence of artificial intelligence on market trends reveals that the global post-harvest treatment market is projected to witness a substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 1.31 billion expected between 2024 and 2028. The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.07% throughout the forecast period. This suggests a promising outlook for the post-harvest treatment industry, driven by advancements in AI technology.

news.headline: Global hummus market expected to grow by $2.85 billion (2024-2028) with AI advancements and new packaging innovations.
news.summary: In an analysis of the impact of artificial intelligence on market dynamics, it was revealed that the global hummus market is projected to see a significant growth, with an anticipated increase of USD 2.85 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research conducted by Technavio suggests that the market is expected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.5% over the forecasted period.

Lupus nephritis clinical trial pipeline expands with 30+ companies; market growth expected due to rising prevalence, therapeutics advancements.
news.summary: The market for lupus nephritis is on the brink of expansion, fueled by a surge in disease cases, progress in treatments like biologics and targeted therapies, and a boost in research and development funding. Enhanced understanding and strong backing from governments and major players in the industry contribute to this trend. This escalation is expected to result in significant growth in the market, attracting attention due to its potential for advancement.

Brookfield expands investment in France with a new office hub in Paris, focusing on renewable energy, digital infrastructure, and real estate. Neoen deal nears completion.
news.summary: A new office hub has recently been inaugurated in Paris, with a strong emphasis on renewable energy, digital infrastructure, and real estate development. The transaction involving Neoen is close to finalizing its initial phase.

news.headline: SmartDrone Corporation acquires Skytec's drone operations, expanding UAV service capabilities, effective Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Tyler, Texas on December 3, 2024, SmartDrone Corporation, also known as "The U.S.A. Drone Company", revealed their acquisition of the drone operations segment of Skytec, LLC, a prominent Chattanooga-based company specializing in remote sensing and GIS technology. SmartDrone's acquisition of Skytec's drone operations signifies a strategic move that will aid in the extension of their business.

news.headline: Regal Cineworld secures new $1.9 billion loan following record $1 billion Q3 revenue.
news.summary: Regal Cineworld, a prominent theater operator, has recently announced a successful refinancing move after achieving remarkable milestones. In Q3 of the fiscal year, the company saw unprecedented success with revenue exceeding $1 billion. The refinancing effort resulted in Regal Cineworld securing a substantial new Term Loan B facility totaling $1.9 billion USD. This development showcases the company's commitment to growth and financial stability.

news.headline: Salesforce's revenue surpasses expectations, boosts software sector.

Cryptocurrency market trading lower. BTC at $96,114.25 (+0.8%), ETH $3,616 (+0.2%), Dogecoin $0.4116 (-2%). Large transaction volume up 125.5%, $100,000 transactions up to 12,355. 216,766 traders liquidated, $590.24 million loss in 24 hours. Bitcoin long-term holders at 12.45 million BTC – lowest since July 2022.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw a dip on Tuesday, with altcoins maintaining their positive trend. Key prices include Bitcoin at $96,114.25 (+0.8%), Ethereum at $3,616 (+0.2%), Solana at $236.50 (+3.2%), Dogecoin at $0.4116 (-2%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00002826 (-2%). Noteworthy data reveals a 125.5% surge in large transaction volume and a 28% increase in daily active addresses. Transactions over $100,000 rose from 8,298 to 12,355 in one day. No Bitcoin holders are currently in a loss position. Coinglass data indicates 216,766 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, totaling $590.24 million. Long-term Bitcoin holders hold 12.45 million BTC, the lowest level since July 2022. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

Remaining performance obligations as of Oct. 31, 2024, reached $1.282 billion, reflecting a 13% increase year-over-year. Billings for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 totaled $264.7 million, a 4% ...Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trading in cryptocurrency surpasses stock trading in South Korea, according to Bloomberg's report.
Lucara Diamond Corp. announces 2025 guidance with diamond revenue forecasted at $195-225 million from 360,000-400,000 carats recovered.
news.summary: Lucara Diamond Corp. has achieved significant milestones in 2024 at its Karowe Mine in Botswana, including recovering two exceptional diamonds larger than 1,000 carats each. The company's focus on underground mining has shown significant progress. In 2025, they anticipate diamond revenue between $195-225 million, with diamond sales of 400,000-420,000 carats and 360,000-400,000 diamonds recovered. Operating costs are estimated at $28.50-31.00 per tonne processed, with investments in the underground project and sustaining capital. The revenue forecast is based on high-value diamond units and sustainable mining practices. Karowe Mine expects to mine 1.6-2.0 million tonnes of ore, process 2.6-2.9 million tonnes, and maintain an exchange rate of 13.0 Botswana Pula per US Dollar. The forecast reflects consistency in mining, processing, and sales strategies to drive profitability and sustainability. The company remains optimistic based on its previous successes and strategic advancements.

news.headline: Global spray gun market projected to expand by USD 229.8 million (2024-2028), driven by paints and coatings sector growth.
news.summary: In a recent report utilizing AI technology to analyze market trends, it has been projected that the global spray gun market will experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 229.8 million between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to expand at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.2% during this forecast period. This growth trajectory indicates significant opportunities for market players in the industry.
